query:
SELECT 'dailyRecapRequests' as t, status, COUNT(*) as cnt, MAX(sent_at) as last_sent_at, MAX(replied_at) as last_replied_at FROM dailyRecapRequests GROUP BY status
UNION ALL
SELECT 'icalFeeds' as t, '-' as status, COUNT(*), MAX(lastFetchedAt), NULL FROM icalFeeds
UNION ALL
SELECT 'icalEvents' as t, '-' as status, COUNT(*), MAX(forDate), NULL FROM icalEvents
UNION ALL
SELECT 'weekly_digests' as t, status, COUNT(*), MAX(generated_at), MAX(sent_at) FROM weekly_digests GROUP BY status;
